name: Stella
description: Five-pointed stars twinkling over midnight felt — each one flexes its points and leans into a new tilt per redraw.

code.style: --starc: @p(var(--color1), var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4)); --rule: ( @random(${shapeFrequency}) { :after { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: @rand(8%, 22%); background: var(--starc); clip-path: polygon(50% 0%, @rand(58%, 66%) @rand(32%, 38%), 98% 35%, @rand(64%, 74%) @rand(54%, 62%), 79% 91%, 50% @rand(66%, 76%), 21% 91%, @rand(26%, 36%) @rand(54%, 62%), 2% 35%, @rand(34%, 42%) @rand(32%, 38%)); transform: rotate(@rand(-24deg, 24deg)); transition: ease 600ms; } } );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
